decision.rationale: A bounded EDGAR probe confirmed SEC submissions metadata, 13F-HR/13F-HR/A acceptance timestamps, archive index resolution, information-table XML parsing, and same-filer same-CUSIP quarter-to-quarter change mechanics. The scout did not establish a conservative public CUSIP-to-ticker/common-stock mapping with qfa/Alpaca liquid daily-bar coverage, so the mapped breadth and concentration hard gates could not pass. No performance evaluation was run.

data.source: SEC EDGAR submissions metadata and archive information-table XML for 13F-HR / 13F-HR/A filings

change_table_probe.timestamp_policy: Use EDGAR acceptanceDateTime and trade no earlier than the next tradable session after public acceptance; do not use report period date as signal time.

candidate_pool.description: Potential 13F-HR/13F-HR/A information-table holdings and same-filer quarterly CUSIP changes for institutional managers, excluding 13F-NT and PUT/CALL rows for the primary alpha universe.

passed_components: SEC submissions metadata reachable for sampled filer CIKs
archive index and information-table XML resolution worked in sampled filings
CUSIP/share/value parser supported same-filer quarterly change mechanics in sampled filings
failed_components: no conservative timestamp-safe CUSIP-to-ticker/common-stock mapping was established
mapped liquid common-stock issuer breadth was not proven to be >=150-250
qfa/Alpaca daily-bar coverage was not checked because mapping gate failed
issuer/filer/sector/quarter/year concentration safety was not completed
amendment de-duplication/replacement policy was not fully implemented
source_gate.reason: 13F information tables are parseable and contain broad CUSIP-level changes, but the issue's hard gate requires a conservative mapped liquid common-stock event universe before any returns test. Filing rows generally provide CUSIP/name/class, not ticker, and inferring current tickers from names would introduce ambiguity and survivorship/lookahead risk.

performance_run.reason: Source/mapping gate failed; no returns, event windows, ranker, costs, random periods, shifted/shuffled labels, calendar/momentum/sector controls, daemon, or orders were evaluated.

limitations: The probe was intentionally bounded and did not retain raw SEC filings, parsed tables, bars, databases, caches, or helper scripts.
13F rows include CUSIP/name/class and can include options; PUT/CALL rows must be excluded or controlled.
CUSIP-to-ticker/common-stock mapping is the central unresolved dependency; current-name inference is not conservative enough for alpha validation.
Amendments may restate prior reports and require a durable replacement policy before full event construction.
No qfa/Alpaca market data were requested because no valid mapped tradable universe was produced.
status_rationale: Rejected for this research cycle at source/mapping gate with a disabled zero-weight model. No direct 13F continuation child was created.
